creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Unfortunately it is a common problem with many GNOME ports. Currently, all 
GNOME components assume that there will be no gtkdoc-* at the compile time. 
Obviously this problem need to be addressed somewhen, but this isn't going 
to happen immediately because our resources are severely limited. Patches 
sent as a followup to this PR would certainly help, though. 

Nevertheless, thank you for reporting!
